lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: Good day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: My name is Clerk. I work on gathering people together to form what we call clans.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is a clan?

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: Ah, clans. Where do I begin? Clans are groups of people gathered together for numerous reasons. Usually they have shared interests, like activities they enjoy together.

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: These activities could include improving certain skills, battling the same monsters, or even battling other clans!

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: Other clans form together because they just enjoy the company of other like-minded people. The clan community can be a great resource if you should ever need help with anything.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I join a clan?

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: You can either form your own clan with your friends, or apply to an already existing clan.

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: Should you choose to form your own clan you will need four friends to join you, and it is recommended that you have spent a good amount of time in this world first. Leadership is not for everyone.

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: However, fret not. There are plenty of interesting and exciting clans out there! Check out the clan recruitment board to see which clans are currently accepting applications.

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: You can either form your own clan with your friends, or apply to an already existing clan.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can a clan offer me?

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: Clans offer you the ability to have an official gathering of friends or like-minded individuals in a hierarchical structure.

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: In other words, you and your friends get an exclusive chat channel and a Clan Hall, as well as the ability to assign ranks to members.

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: Ranks can be assigned from custom pre-sets, which then determine what permissions that person has.

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: For example: One person may have the rank to kick players from the chat, while another has the rank to access the Clan Coffer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is the Clan Coffer?

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: The Clan Coffer is a shared coin store, used by members of the clan. Highly ranked members can assign who has permission to deposit and withdraw coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is a Clan Hall?

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: A Clan Hall is a private area only accessible for the people with the permission to enter. High ranked members of the clan can restrict it to only allow certain ranks in, or open it up to even allow guests.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why would I need a Clan Hall? Can't I get a house instead?

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: The beauty of it is that you can have both. You can keep your house for private guests and your own personal use, but when you wish to see larger groups then the Clan Hall may be more fitting.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do here?

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: My mission is to administer clans; I help form them and can tell you anything you need to know about them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure, but why are you here specifically?

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: Why does anyone go anywhere? As a gatherer of people, I go where people gather. The Grand Exchange is known to be a place where people come together. What better place to bring them even closer?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I suppose this usually is a crowded place.

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: Very much so. I was lucky to find this charming corner to set up the clan hub.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's the clan hub?

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: The clan hub is what I call this area, my little corner of the Grand Exchange. This is where every clan is born, as well as the best place to look for new recruits.

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: If you're in a clan you can also access your Clan Hall from here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm in a clan. Can you give me anything?

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: I've got cloaks that let you show your clan's colours, and vexilla to help you recruit more people into your clan, but you don't have space to take any.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I suppose I'd better free up some space.

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: Yes, you should! Now, did you want to ask me anything else while you're here?

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: Certainly. I've got cloaks that let you show your clan's colours, and vexilla to help you recruit more people into your clan.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: Goodbye. Come back any time.

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: Sorry, you'll have to come back another day. I'm not ready to serve you yet.
